Hello, my name is Gladys Kartin and I am fascinated with your background and interests. My thinking is that you would benefit from some clarity conversations that will help you focus on your next streps. Let’s chat and please provide your availability. Thank you

I'm a leadership coach for JP Morgan and empower marketing, advertising, technology and business professionals to take next steps in their careers. I regularly prepare mid and senior level resources for their performance reviews and present methods to improve leadership skills. I'm also a recruiter and coach professionals to have powerful job search road maps.  My methodology is based on transferring knowledge to execute job search strategies, write compelling resumes and LinkedIn profiles, conduct mock interviews designed to nail interviews and secure offers.  My website: https://renaissance-sol.com/reviews/

A strong resume after graduation is important to tell your unique story, that will invite recruiters and interviewers to understand your background and remember you before meeting you. I have revised, edited, and created dozens of these stories that have landed interviews at Google, Microsoft, and other top companies.    As a senior-level director with 15 years of management experience from start-up to large corporations, I've reviewed countless resumes and can impart what draws my attention as a hiring manager for an applicant. I've helped my own employees find new roles (if their current role was unfulfilling) and have updated resumes for inter-industry and career changes. My desire to take my executive experience to help others inspired me to become a certified coach, providing 1-on-1, personalized coaching.    If we work together, I offer a service level that expands over several days, starting at $100 for a full week of partnership. My services include, but are not limited to:  • a minimum of three calls, to understand history, progress, and goals.  • a review and ATS scoring of your resume and LinkedIn profile, looking for what recruiters would look for  • continuous online communication for questions and feedback  • a 2-5 day turnaround dependent on complexity  • a guarantee to improve your ATS score    I would welcome the opportunity to connect to see if my experience may be a match for your request.
